parameters.formDescription: 貼上 podcast 連結，系統會嘗試抓音訊、產出逐字稿與摘要，幫你快速判斷值不值得花時間收聽。

values.placeholder: https://example.com/episode.mp3 或 podcast episode 頁面
例如：我想判斷這集對 AI 產品經理是否有價值
輸入你的 AssemblyAI API key

parameters.jsCode: const input=items[0].json||{};const rawUrl=(input.podcast_url||input.audio_url||input.url||'').trim();const goal=(input.interest_goal||'General learning value for a busy knowledge worker').trim();const apiKey=(input.assemblyai_api_key||'').trim();if(!rawUrl) throw new Error('Missing `podcast_url` or `audio_url`.');if(!apiKey) throw new Error('Missing `assemblyai_api_key`.');const sleep=(ms)=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const pick=(html,baseUrl,patterns)=>{for(const pattern of patterns){const m=html.match(pattern);if(m&&m[1]){try{return new URL(m[1],baseUrl).href;}catch{return m[1];}}}return null;};async function resolveMediaUrl(url){if(/\.(mp3|m4a|mp4|wav|aac|ogg)(\?|$)/i.test(url)) return url;let head=null;try{head=await fetch(url,{method:'HEAD',redirect:'follow'});}catch{}const headType=head?.headers?.get('content-type')||'';const headUrl=head?.url||url;if(headType.startsWith('audio/')||headType.startsWith('video/')) return headUrl;if(/\.(mp3|m4a|mp4|wav|aac|ogg)(\?|$)/i.test(headUrl)) return headUrl;const page=await fetch(url,{redirect:'follow'});const html=await page.text();const media=pick(html,page.url,[/property=["']og:audio["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/name=["']twitter:player:stream["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/<audio[^>]*src=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/<source[^>]*src=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/enclosure[^>]*url=["']([^"']+)["']/i,/"audio"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/i,/"contentUrl"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/i]);if(media) return media;throw new Error('Could not find an audio URL on this page. Try a direct MP3/M4A link or an RSS episode link.');}const audioUrl=await resolveMediaUrl(rawUrl);const createRes=await fetch('https://api.assemblyai.com/v2/transcript',{method:'POST',headers:{Authorization:apiKey,'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({audio_url:audioUrl,auto_chapters:true,auto_highlights:true,speaker_labels:false,language_detection:true,summarization:true,summary_model:'informative',summary_type:'bullets'})});const created=await createRes.json();if(!createRes.ok||!created.id) throw new Error(`AssemblyAI submit failed: ${JSON.stringify(created)}`);let transcript=null;for(let i=0;i<90;i++){const pollRes=await fetch(`https://api.assemblyai.com/v2/transcript/${created.id}`,{headers:{Authorization:apiKey}});const data=await pollRes.json();if(!pollRes.ok) throw new Error(`AssemblyAI poll failed: ${JSON.stringify(data)}`);if(data.status==='completed'){transcript=data;break;}if(data.status==='error') throw new Error(`AssemblyAI transcription error: ${data.error||'unknown error'}`);await sleep(10000);}if(!transcript) throw new Error('Timed out waiting for transcript. Increase polling duration if your podcast is very long.');const highlights=(transcript.auto_highlights_result?.results||[]).slice(0,10).map(x=>x.text);const chapters=(transcript.chapters||[]).map(x=>({headline:x.headline,summary:x.summary,start_ms:x.start,end_ms:x.end}));const minutes=Math.round((transcript.audio_duration||0)/60);let score=5;if(highlights.length>=3) score+=1;if(highlights.length>=6) score+=1;if(chapters.length>=2) score+=1;if(chapters.length>=4) score+=1;if(transcript.summary) score+=1;if(minutes>=15&&minutes<=90) score+=1;if(minutes>120) score-=1;score=Math.max(1,Math.min(10,score));const recommendation=score>=8?'Worth a full listen.':'Read the summary first, then decide.';return [{json:{input_url:rawUrl,resolved_audio_url:audioUrl,interest_goal:goal,transcript_id:transcript.id,audio_minutes:minutes,estimated_value_score:score,recommendation,note:'The score is heuristic. Use chapters/highlights/summary to make the final decision.',assemblyai_summary:transcript.summary||'',key_highlights:highlights,chapters,transcript:transcript.text||''}}];

const data=items[0].json;const esc=(value='')=>String(value).replace(/&/g,'&').replace(//g,'>').replace(/"/g,'"').replace(/'/g,''');const summary=esc(data.assemblyai_summary||'No summary returned.');const highlights=(data.key_highlights||[]).slice(0,5).map(h=>`
  • ${esc(h)}
    • `).join('');const chapters=(data.chapters||[]).slice(0,4).map(c=>`
  • ${esc(c.headline||'Untitled chapter')}: ${esc(c.summary||'')}
    • `).join('');const title=`Score ${data.estimated_value_score}/10 - ${data.recommendation}`;const message=`

    Audio length: ${esc(data.audio_minutes)} minutes

    Goal: ${esc(data.interest_goal||'General')}

    Summary:

    ${summary.replace(/ /g,'
    ')}

    Top highlights:

      ${highlights||'
    • No highlights returned.
      • '}

    Chapters:

      ${chapters||'
    • No chapters returned.
      • '}

    Transcript ID: ${esc(data.transcript_id||'')}

    完整 transcript 會保留在這次 workflow execution 的輸出資料中。

    `;return [{json:{...data,completion_title:title,completion_message:message}}];
